title: Ammadi Un Azhagu Lyrics Vellakkara Durai
stanzas:
Ammadi Un Azhagu Song Lyrics From Vellakkara Durai
#DImman #dsathyaprakash #Yugabharathi

ammadi un azhagu
semma dhoolu
unna kanda pozhudhum
thiru naalu

una paathu dhaan
thadu maaruraen
puyal kaathula
pori aaguraen

adi maadu naan
merandoduran
oru vaartha sollu
uyir thaaran

ammadi un azhaghu
semma dhoolu
unna kanda pozhudhum
thiru naalu

munnazhagil neeyum seera
pinnazhaghil yaerum bodhai
potta pulla una naan
paarthu sottu sotta
karanjaenae

rekka katti parandha aalu
potti kulla adanjaenae

aathadi nee dhaan azhukku
adaiyaadha paal norai
saethoda vaazhndhum karai
padiyaadha thaamarai

ammadi un azhaghu
semma dhoolu
unna kanda pozhudhum
thiru naalu

kann irandu podha villa
kattazhagha paathu solla
ottu motha oyila kaana
pathu senmam eduppaenae

kattu etta kaninja unna
katti vechu rasipaenae

dhesaadhi dhesam vara
thirinjaenae aambala
aanaalum kooda
Radhi una pola paakkala

ammadi un azhaghu
semma dhoolu
unna kanda pozhudhum
thiru naalu

una paathu dhaan
thadu maaruraen
puyal kaathula
pori aaguraen

adi maadu naan
merandoduran
oru vaartha sollu
uyir thaaran

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Ammadi Un Azhagu?

The music was composed by the talented D Imman.

Which movie features the song Ammadi Un Azhagu?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Vellakkaradurai.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Vellakkaradurai?

The lead roles are played by Vikram Prabhu and Sri Divya.

What is the theme of the song Ammadi Un Azhagu?

The song portrays a romantic and joyful celebration of love.

When was the movie Vellakkaradurai released?

The movie was released in the year 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ammadi Un Azhagu from the Tamil movie Vellakkaradurai, released in 2014, is a delightful romantic melody. Featuring the lead pair Vikram Prabhu and Sri Divya, the song captures the essence of love and admiration. Composed by D Imman and sung by Sathya Prakash, the track is enriched with heartfelt lyrics by Yugabharathi. The vibrant and melodious tune, combined with the expressive performances of the actors, makes this song a memorable addition to Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ammadi Un Azhagu, a mesmerizing track from the movie Vellakkaradurai, captivates listeners with its enchanting melody and heartfelt lyrics. Composed by the talented D Imman and beautifully sung by Sathya Prakash, this song perfectly encapsulates the romantic essence of the film. Experience the magic of Tamil cinema through this unforgettable musical gem.
